local command1 = "!warn"
local command2 = "!warnings"
local command3 = "!clearwarnings"

local canClearwarnings = false -- True: Mod can clear their own warnings | False: Mod can clear only others warnings

local mods = {
["meely323"] = true,
["morcrane"] = true,
["ryan_16101"] = true,
["MrVladelets"] = true
}
------------ End of Settings. Do not edit anything beyond here unless I say so
local function isMod(plr)
return mods[plr] == true
end

local warnings = {}

local host = getHost()
for _, name in ipairs(getPlayers()) do
    if getUserId(name) == getHost() then
        host = name
        break
end
end

local function getPlayerFromPartial(name)
    name = string.lower(name)

    for _, player in pairs(getPlayers()) do
        if string.find(string.lower(player), name, 1, true) then
            return player
        end
    end

    return nil
end

event("chatted", function(data)
    local plr = data.Value[1]
    local msg = data.Value[2]

if msg:sub(1,#command1) == command1 and isMod(plr) then

     local partialName = string.lower(msg:sub(7))
     local target = getPlayerFromPartial(msg:sub(#command1 + 2))


    if target then
        
        warnings[target] = (warnings[target] or 0) + 1
        setPlayerScore(target, warnings[target])

        announce(target,"[WARNING]: " .. plr .. " has warned you. \nTotal warnings: " .. warnings[target])
        announce(plr,"[SYSTEM]: Successfully warned " .. target)

        if warnings[target] >= 3 then
            runCommand("kick " .. target .. " [SYSTEM]: You have reached 3 warnings, initiated AutoKick. Responsible moderator: " .. plr)
        end
    end
end 

if msg:sub(1,#command2) == command2 and isMod(plr) then

    local target = getPlayerFromPartial(msg:sub(#command2 + 2))

    if target then
        local count = warnings[target] or 0
        announce(plr,"[SYSTEM]: " .. target .. " has " .. count .. " warning(s).")
    else
        announce(plr,"[FAILURE]: Player not found.")
    end
end

  if msg:sub(1,#command3) == command3 and isMod(plr) then

        local target = getPlayerFromPartial(msg:sub(#command3 + 2))

        if not target then
            announce(plr,"[FAILURE]: Player not found.")
            return
        end

        if not canClearwarnings and target == plr then
            announce(plr,"[WARNING]: You cannot clear your own warnings.")
            return
        end

        warnings[target] = 0
        setPlayerScore(target, 0)

        announce(plr,"[SYSTEM]: Cleared warnings for " .. target)

        announce(target,"[SYSTEM]: Your warnings were cleared by " .. plr)
    end
end)
